title: HTML
description: Learn webpage structure and semantic design.
longDescription: HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the foundation of all web pages. It provides the structure and meaning to content on the web. Master semantic HTML to build accessible, SEO-friendly websites that work across all devices.

modules.title: Introduction to HTML
modules.description: Understanding what HTML is, its history, and how it works with other web technologies.

modules.title: HTML Document Structure
modules.description: Learning the basic structure of HTML documents including doctype, head, and body elements.

modules.title: Text Elements & Headings
modules.description: Working with headings, paragraphs, text formatting, and semantic text elements.

modules.title: Links & Navigation
modules.description: Creating hyperlinks, navigation menus, and understanding URL structures.

modules.title: Images & Media
modules.description: Embedding images, videos, audio, and other media content in web pages.

modules.title: Lists & Tables
modules.description: Building ordered lists, unordered lists, and data tables with proper semantics.

modules.title: Forms & Inputs
modules.description: Creating interactive forms with various input types, validation, and submission.

modules.title: Semantic HTML5
modules.description: Using modern semantic elements like header, nav, main, section, article, and footer.

modules.title: Accessibility
modules.description: Making HTML accessible with ARIA attributes, alt text, and proper semantics.

modules.title: SEO Best Practices
modules.description: Optimizing HTML for search engines with meta tags, structured data, and more.

title: CSS
description: Build modern responsive beautiful interfaces.
longDescription: CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) brings life to web pages with colors, layouts, animations, and responsive design. Learn to create stunning user interfaces that work beautifully across all devices.

modules.title: CSS Fundamentals
modules.description: Selectors, properties, values, and the cascade.

modules.title: Box Model
modules.description: Understanding margin, padding, border, and content areas.

modules.title: Typography & Colors
modules.description: Fonts, text styling, color systems, and gradients.

modules.title: Layout with Flexbox
modules.description: Building flexible layouts with Flexbox.

modules.title: Layout with Grid
modules.description: Creating complex grid-based layouts.

modules.title: Responsive Design
modules.description: Media queries, fluid layouts, and mobile-first design.

modules.title: Animations & Transitions
modules.description: CSS transitions, transforms, and keyframe animations.

modules.title: CSS Preprocessors
modules.description: Introduction to SASS/SCSS for more maintainable CSS.

title: JavaScript
description: Add dynamic functionality to your websites.
longDescription: JavaScript is the programming language of the web. It enables interactive web pages, dynamic content, and full-stack applications. Master the language that powers modern web development.

modules.title: JS Fundamentals
modules.description: Variables, data types, operators, and basic syntax.

modules.title: Control Flow
modules.description: Conditionals, loops, and logical operations.

modules.title: Functions & Scope
modules.description: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions, and scoping.

modules.title: Arrays & Objects
modules.description: Working with collections of data using arrays and objects.

modules.title: DOM Manipulation
modules.description: Selecting, creating, and modifying DOM elements.

modules.title: Events
modules.description: Event handling, propagation, and custom events.

modules.title: ES6+ Features
modules.description: Modern JavaScript features like destructuring, spread, and modules.

modules.title: Async JavaScript
modules.description: Promises, async/await, and handling asynchronous operations.

modules.title: APIs & Fetch
modules.description: Making HTTP requests and working with REST APIs.

modules.title: Error Handling
modules.description: Try/catch, error objects, and debugging techniques.

title: Python
description: Learn automation, AI, scripting, and backend.

modules.title: Python Basics
modules.description: Syntax, variables, and data types.

modules.title: Control Structures
modules.description: If/else, loops, and comprehensions.

modules.title: Functions & Modules
modules.description: Defining functions, importing modules, and packages.

modules.title: Data Structures
modules.description: Lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries, and their methods.

modules.title: File I/O
modules.description: Reading and writing files in Python.

modules.title: OOP in Python
modules.description: Classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.

modules.title: Libraries & Frameworks
modules.description: NumPy, Pandas, Flask, and Django basics.

modules.title: Working with APIs
modules.description: Making HTTP requests and processing JSON data.

title: Java
description: Learn object oriented programming concepts.

modules.title: Java Fundamentals
modules.description: JVM, syntax, data types, and operators.

modules.title: OOP Principles
modules.description: Encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction.

modules.title: Collections Framework
modules.description: Lists, sets, maps, and their implementations.

modules.title: Exception Handling
modules.description: Try/catch, custom exceptions, and best practices.

modules.title: Multithreading
modules.description: Threads, synchronization, and concurrency.

modules.title: File I/O & Serialization
modules.description: Reading/writing files and object serialization.

modules.title: JDBC & Databases
modules.description: Connecting Java applications to databases.

modules.title: Java 8+ Features
modules.description: Streams, lambdas, functional interfaces, and optionals.

modules.title: C Basics
modules.description: Syntax, variables, and data types.

modules.title: Pointers & Memory

modules.title: Functions

modules.title: Structures & Unions

description: Build desktop apps, games, and backend APIs.

modules.title: C# Basics
modules.description: Syntax, types, and .NET framework.

modules.title: OOP in C#
modules.description: Classes, inheritance, and interfaces.

modules.title: LINQ & Collections
modules.description: Language Integrated Query and collections.

modules.title: ASP.NET Core
modules.description: Building web APIs with .NET.

modules.title: Web Development

modules.title: Concurrency

modules.title: Swift Basics

modules.title: iOS Development
modules.description: Building complete iOS applications.

modules.title: Kotlin Basics
modules.description: Syntax, null safety, and type system.

modules.title: Functions & Lambdas
modules.description: Higher-order functions and lambdas.

modules.title: Object-Oriented
modules.description: Classes, data classes, and sealed classes.

modules.title: Coroutines

modules.description: SELECT, WHERE, and basic queries.

modules.description: Database indexing and query performance.

description: Build and manage relational databases.

modules.title: Database Design
modules.description: ER diagrams and normalization.

modules.title: CRUD Operations
modules.description: Create, Read, Update, Delete in MySQL.

modules.title: Advanced Queries
modules.description: Joins, subqueries, and views.

modules.title: Stored Procedures
modules.description: Procedures, functions, and triggers.

modules.title: Performance Tuning
modules.description: Indexing, query optimization, and caching.

title: Pandas
description: Analyze and manipulate datasets efficiently.

modules.title: DataFrames Basics
modules.description: Creating and exploring DataFrames.

modules.title: Data Cleaning
modules.description: Handling missing data and duplicates.

modules.title: Data Transformation
modules.description: Grouping, merging, and reshaping data.

modules.title: Time Series
modules.description: Working with dates and time series data.

modules.title: Visualization
modules.description: Plotting with Pandas and Matplotlib.

title: Node.js
description: Create fast scalable backend applications.

modules.title: Node.js Basics
modules.description: Event loop, modules, and NPM.

modules.title: Express.js
modules.description: Routing, middleware, and REST APIs.

modules.title: Database Integration
modules.description: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and ORMs.

modules.title: Authentication
modules.description: JWT, OAuth, and session management.

modules.title: Deployment
modules.description: Deploying Node.js applications.

title: DSA
description: Learn algorithms, problem solving, and logic.

modules.title: Complexity Analysis
modules.description: Time and space complexity, Big O notation.

modules.title: Arrays & Hashing
modules.description: Array manipulation, hash maps, and sets.

modules.title: Two Pointers
modules.description: Two pointer technique and sliding window.

modules.title: Stack & Queue
modules.description: Stack and queue implementations and problems.

modules.title: Linked Lists
modules.description: Singly, doubly, and circular linked lists.

modules.title: Trees & Graphs
modules.description: BST, AVL, DFS, BFS, and graph algorithms.

modules.title: Dynamic Programming
modules.description: Memoization, tabulation, and DP patterns.

modules.title: Greedy Algorithms
modules.description: Greedy approach and interval problems.

modules.title: Recursion & Backtracking
modules.description: Recursive problem solving and backtracking.

modules.title: Sorting & Searching
modules.description: Sorting algorithms and binary search variations.

title: TypeScript
description: TypeScript adds static typing, classes, interfaces, and advanced tooling to JavaScript.
longDescription: TypeScript was created by Anders Hejlsberg at Microsoft to address the challenges of building large-scale JavaScript applications. It adds a powerful type system on top of JavaScript, enabling developers to catch type-related bugs at compile time rather than runtime.

modules.title: TypeScript Setup & Basics
modules.description: Installing TypeScript, tsconfig.json configuration, compiling TS to JS, watching files, integrating with VS Code.

modules.title: Primitive Types & Annotations
modules.description: string, number, boolean, null, undefined, void, never, unknown, any, type annotations, and type inference.

modules.title: Interfaces & Type Aliases
modules.description: Defining interfaces, optional properties, readonly properties, index signatures, extending interfaces, type vs interface.

modules.title: Functions & Arrays
modules.description: Function type annotations, optional/default/rest parameters, overloads, typed arrays, tuples, and array methods.

modules.title: Generics
modules.description: Generic functions, generic constraints, generic interfaces, generic classes, keyof, conditional types with generics.

modules.title: Enums & Union/Intersection Types
modules.description: Numeric enums, string enums, const enums, union types, discriminated unions, intersection types, type narrowing.

modules.title: Classes & Access Modifiers
modules.description: public, private, protected, readonly, parameter properties, abstract classes, static members, implements.

modules.title: Modules & Namespaces
modules.description: ES modules import/export, namespace keyword, ambient declarations, module resolution, barrel exports.

modules.title: Mapped & Conditional Types
modules.description: Mapped types (in keyof), conditional types (extends), infer keyword, distributive conditional types, template literal types.

modules.title: Utility Types
modules.description: Partial, Required, Readonly, Pick, Omit, Record, Exclude, Extract, NonNullable, ReturnType, Parameters, Awaited.

modules.title: Decorators
modules.description: Class decorators, method decorators, property decorators, accessor decorators, parameter decorators, decorator factories.

modules.title: Declaration Files & .d.ts
modules.description: Writing declaration files, ambient module declarations, triple-slash directives, publishing types, @types packages.

modules.title: Advanced Type Inference
modules.description: Contextual typing, type widening, type narrowing, discriminated unions, assertion functions, type predicates.

modules.title: Template Literal Types
modules.description: String literal interpolation, intrinsic string types, pattern matching.

modules.title: Module Augmentation & Declaration Merging
modules.description: Merging interfaces, augmenting external modules, global augmentation, namespace merging, enum merging.

modules.title: Compiler API & Custom Transforms
modules.description: TypeScript compiler architecture, AST traversal, custom transformers, programmatic compilation, ts-morph library.

title: React
description: Build dynamic user interfaces with components and a virtual DOM.
longDescription: React was created by Jordan Walke at Facebook in 2011 and open-sourced in 2013. It introduced the concept of a virtual DOM, which minimizes direct DOM manipulation by computing diffs between component states and applying minimal updates.

modules.title: React Fundamentals & JSX
modules.description: Setting up a React project with Vite, JSX syntax, rendering elements, React StrictMode, and project structure.

modules.title: Components & Props
modules.description: Functional components, component composition, props, children, default props, prop types, fragment shorthand.

modules.title: Conditional Rendering & Lists
modules.description: Ternary operators, logical &&, if-else patterns, map() for lists, list keys, key best practices.

modules.title: Events & Forms
modules.description: Event handling in React, synthetic events, form inputs, controlled components, uncontrolled refs, form validation.

modules.title: State with useState
modules.description: useState hook, state updates, immutability, state batching, derived state, lifting state up, colocation.

modules.title: Side Effects with useEffect
modules.description: useEffect hook, dependency arrays, cleanup functions, data fetching, subscriptions, timers, effect lifecycle.

modules.title: Refs & DOM Manipulation
modules.description: useRef hook, ref forwarding, imperative DOM access, measuring elements, storing mutable values, callback refs.

modules.title: Component Communication
modules.description: Props drilling, lifting state, callback props, children composition, context basics, compound components.

modules.title: Context API & useContext
modules.description: React.createContext, useContext hook, provider pattern, context performance, memoizing context values, nested contexts.

modules.title: useReducer & State Management
modules.description: useReducer hook, reducer pattern, dispatch actions, action types, complex state logic, combining with context.

modules.title: Custom Hooks
modules.description: Building custom hooks, hook composition, useLocalStorage, useDebounce, useFetch, useMediaQuery patterns.

modules.title: React Router
modules.description: React Router v6, BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Link, NavLink, useParams, useNavigate, nested routes, lazy loading.

modules.title: Performance Optimization
modules.description: React.memo, useMemo, useCallback, lazy loading, Suspense, virtualization (react-window), bundle analysis.

modules.title: Testing React Apps
modules.description: React Testing Library, Jest, testing components, testing hooks, mocking API calls, user events, accessibility tests.

modules.title: State Management (Redux/Zustand)
modules.description: Redux Toolkit, createSlice, configureStore, Zustand, stores, selectors, actions, middleware, devtools.

modules.title: Next.js & Full-Stack React
modules.description: Next.js App Router, server components, server actions, data fetching, SSR/SSG/ISR, API routes, middleware.

title: Git & GitHub
description: Track changes, collaborate, and manage code with version control.
longDescription: Git is a distributed version control system created by Linus Torvalds in 2005. It tracks changes to files, enables collaboration, and provides a complete history of project evolution without requiring a server for basic operations.

modules.title: Getting Started with Git
modules.description: Installing Git, configuring name/email, git init, git clone, the .git directory structure.

modules.title: Basic Operations
modules.description: git add, git commit, git status, git log, git diff, .gitignore patterns.

modules.title: Branching Basics
modules.description: git branch, git checkout/switch, creating branches, switching branches, branch naming conventions.

modules.title: Merging
modules.description: git merge, fast-forward vs 3-way merge, merge commits, merge conflicts, resolving conflicts.

modules.title: Working with Remotes
modules.description: git remote add, git push, git pull, git fetch, upstream tracking, origin vs upstream.

modules.title: Rebasing
modules.description: git rebase, interactive rebase, rebase vs merge, golden rule of rebasing.

modules.title: Stashing & Cleaning
modules.description: git stash push/pop, stash list, stash apply/drop, git clean.

modules.title: Tags & Releases
modules.description: git tag, lightweight vs annotated tags, semantic versioning, release management.

modules.title: Undoing Changes
modules.description: git revert, git reset (soft/mixed/hard), git restore, git clean.

modules.title: Cherry-Pick & Advanced Merging
modules.description: git cherry-pick, merge strategies, merge options.

modules.title: Git Hooks
modules.description: Client-side hooks, server-side hooks, husky, automating linting/testing.

modules.title: Reflog & Recovery
modules.description: git reflog, recovering lost commits, recovering deleted branches, git fsck.

modules.title: Git Internals
modules.description: Blob, tree, commit, and tag objects; SHA-1 hashing; packfiles.

modules.title: GitHub Workflows
modules.description: Pull requests, code review, GitHub Actions CI/CD, GitHub Pages, GitHub CLI.

modules.title: Git Workflows
modules.description: Git Flow, GitHub Flow, trunk-based development, forking workflow.

modules.title: Advanced Git & Automation
modules.description: git submodules, git worktree, git bisect, Git LFS.

title: MongoDB
description: Store and query data with a flexible NoSQL document database.
longDescription: MongoDB was created by Dwight Merriman and Eliot Horowitz in 2007 to solve scalability issues with relational databases. It uses a document model where data is stored as BSON documents in collections, rather than rows in tables.

modules.title: Introduction & Setup
modules.description: Installing MongoDB, MongoDB Shell, MongoDB Compass GUI, connecting to local/Atlas instances, basic terminology.

modules.title: CRUD Operations
modules.description: insertOne/insertMany, find with filters, updateOne/updateMany/replaceOne, deleteOne/deleteMany, bulk writes.

modules.title: Query Operators
modules.description: Comparison, logical, element, array, and regex query operators.

modules.title: Document Structure & Data Types
modules.description: BSON types, ObjectId, embedded documents, arrays, dates, document size limits.

modules.title: Indexing
modules.description: Single field indexes, compound indexes, multikey indexes, text indexes, unique indexes, explain() for query analysis.

modules.title: Aggregation Pipeline
modules.description: $match, $group, $sort, $project, $lookup, $unwind, $bucket, $facet, aggregation expressions.

modules.title: Schema Design & Data Modeling
modules.description: Embedding vs referencing, one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many patterns, schema anti-patterns.

modules.title: Mongoose ODM
modules.description: Schemas, models, validation, middleware, virtuals, population, plugins, discriminators.

modules.title: Replica Sets & High Availability
modules.description: Primary/secondary/arbiter nodes, automatic failover, read preferences, write concerns.

modules.title: Sharding & Horizontal Scaling
modules.description: Shard keys, config servers, mongos routers, chunk splitting/migration, shard zones.

modules.title: Transactions
modules.description: Multi-document ACID transactions, session API, transaction lifetime, retry logic.

modules.title: Security & Authentication
modules.description: RBAC, SCRAM authentication, x.509 certificates, field-level encryption, audit logging.

modules.title: Change Streams & Real-Time Data
modules.description: Watching collections for changes, resume tokens, pipeline filtering.

modules.title: GeoSpatial & Time-Series
modules.description: GeoJSON objects, 2dsphere indexes, geospatial queries, time-series collections.

modules.title: Backup, Restore & Maintenance
modules.description: mongodump/mongorestore, Atlas backups, point-in-time recovery, compaction.

modules.title: MongoDB Atlas & Cloud
modules.description: Atlas clusters, serverless instances, Atlas Search, Data Lake, monitoring.

title: Docker
description: Containerize, ship, and run applications anywhere consistently.
longDescription: Docker was launched in 2013 by Solomon Hykes. It popularized containerization by making it easy to create, deploy, and run containers using a simple CLI. Unlike virtual machines, containers share the host OS kernel, making them more lightweight and faster to start.

modules.title: Docker Fundamentals
modules.description: Installing Docker, Docker architecture, containers vs VMs, Docker Desktop, first commands.

modules.title: Working with Images & Containers
modules.description: docker run, start/stop/rm, port mapping, environment variables, detached mode.

modules.title: Dockerfiles
modules.description: FROM, RUN, COPY, ADD, CMD, ENTRYPOINT, WORKDIR, EXPOSE, layers and caching, .dockerignore.

modules.title: Volumes & Data Persistence
modules.description: Bind mounts, named volumes, tmpfs mounts, sharing data between containers.

modules.title: Docker Compose
modules.description: docker-compose.yml, services, networks, volumes, environment, depends_on, ports.

modules.title: Multi-Container Applications
modules.description: Dockerizing web apps, databases, caching, reverse proxy with Docker Compose.

modules.title: Docker Networking
modules.description: Bridge, host, overlay networks; container DNS; network isolation; service discovery.

modules.title: Multi-Stage Builds & Best Practices
modules.description: Multi-stage Dockerfiles, layer caching optimization, security best practices.

modules.title: Docker Swarm & Orchestration
modules.description: Swarm init/join, services, stacks, replicas, rolling updates, Swarm networking.

modules.title: Logging & Monitoring
modules.description: docker logs, logging drivers, Docker metrics, Prometheus integration.

modules.title: Security & Best Practices
modules.description: Image scanning, secret management, user namespaces, rootless mode, content trust.

modules.title: CI/CD with Docker
modules.description: GitHub Actions Docker builds, GitLab CI, Jenkins with Docker, automated testing.

modules.title: Kubernetes Basics
modules.description: Pods, deployments, services, configmaps, secrets, ingress, kubectl, minikube.

modules.title: Docker Registry & Distribution
modules.description: Docker Hub, private registries, Harbor, image tags, multi-architecture images.

modules.title: Docker API & SDK
modules.description: Docker Engine API, Docker SDK for Python/Go/JS, programmatic container management.

modules.title: Production Docker
modules.description: Resource limits, health checks, graceful shutdowns, blue/green deployment.

title: Linux
description: Master the operating system powering servers, cloud, and DevOps.
longDescription: Linux started as a personal project by Linus Torvalds in 1991. Today, the Linux kernel powers the majority of servers, cloud infrastructure, embedded systems, and supercomputers worldwide.

modules.title: Getting Started with Linux
modules.description: Choosing a distro, installation, desktop environment vs CLI, terminal basics, man pages.

modules.title: Filesystem & Navigation
modules.description: Linux filesystem hierarchy, ls, cd, pwd, mkdir, cp, mv, rm, find, locate.

modules.title: File Operations & Permissions
modules.description: cat, less, more, head, tail, wc, chmod, chown, chgrp, file types, symlinks, wildcards.

modules.title: Users, Groups & Permissions
modules.description: useradd/usermod/userdel, groupadd/groupmod, sudo, /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow.

modules.title: Process Management
modules.description: ps, top, htop, kill, nice/renice, bg/fg, jobs, nohup, systemd services.

modules.title: Package Management
modules.description: apt, dnf/yum, pacman, snap, flatpak, adding repos, dpkg/rpm basics.

modules.title: Text Processing & Pipes
modules.description: grep, sed, awk, cut, sort, uniq, tr, tee, xargs, pipelines, I/O redirection.

modules.title: Shell Scripting Basics
modules.description: Bash scripts, variables, conditionals, loops, functions, exit codes.

modules.title: Networking
modules.description: ip, ifconfig, ss, ping, traceroute, curl, wget, DNS, /etc/hosts, nmap.

modules.title: SSH & Remote Access
modules.description: ssh, ssh-keygen, authorized_keys, scp, rsync, sshd_config, port forwarding.

modules.title: Systemd & Service Management
modules.description: systemctl, journalctl, unit files, timers, targets, service dependencies.

modules.title: Firewall & Security
modules.description: iptables/nftables, ufw, firewalld, fail2ban, SELinux, AppArmor.

modules.title: Performance Tuning
modules.description: vmstat, iostat, mpstat, sar, perf, strace, sysctl tuning.

modules.title: Containers & Virtualization
modules.description: Docker on Linux, LXC/LXD, KVM/qemu, Vagrant, cgroups, namespaces.
